sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_63ad84322b8bf2507939ff29c891bf8f
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx.restApiProcessor</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>restApiProcessor</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var restApiProcessor = Class.create();
restApiProcessor.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

  callApi: function() {
    try {
      var requestMethod = this.getParameter('sysparm_request_method');
      var restMethodName = this.getParameter('sysparm_rest_method_name');
      var relativeUrl   = this.getParameter('sysparm_relative_url');
      var requestBody   = this.getParameter('sysparm_request_body');
      var instanceUrl = gs.getProperty('glide.servlet.uri');

      gs.info("restApiProcessor - calling callApi | method: " + requestMethod + " | url: " + instanceUrl + relativeUrl + " | rest_method: " + 'default_'+requestMethod.toLowerCase() + " | body: " + requestBody);

      var r = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2('Cisco_CCIF', restMethodName);
      r.setHttpMethod(requestMethod);
      r.setEndpoint(instanceUrl + relativeUrl);
      r.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json');
      r.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');

      if (!gs.nil(requestBody) && requestBody !== '') {
        r.setRequestBody(requestBody);
      }

      r.setLogLevel('all');

      gs.info("restApiProcessor - callApi endpoint: " + r.getEndpoint());

      var response = r.execute();
      var responseBody = response.getBody();

      gs.info("restApiProcessor - callApi response [" + response.getStatusCode() + "]: " + responseBody);

      return JSON.stringify({
        statusCode: response.getStatusCode(),
        responseBody: responseBody
      });

    } catch (ex) {
      gs.error("restApiProcessor - Error in callApi: " + ex.message);
      return JSON.stringify({
        error: true,
        message: ex.message
      });
    }
  },
  type: 'restApiProcessor'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-17 10:14:26</sys_created_on><sys_id>63ad84322b8bf2507939ff29c891bf8f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>57</sys_mod_count><sys_name>restApiProcessor</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_63ad84322b8bf2507939ff29c891bf8f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-25 22:19:29</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: content_css_ee12a78e8372b210ab2a7629feaad346
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="content_css"><content_css action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><name>gadget_stylesheet</name><style>html, body, #root {
  height: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

#root {
  border: none;
  position: fixed;
}

html, body {
  overflow: hidden;
}

body {
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: center 50px;
	background-color: white;
    background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' version='1.1' height='50px' width='200px'><text x='0' y='15' fill='gray' font-size='18'>Waiting for ServiceNow...</text></svg>");
}

/* hides any content besides our gadget */
body > *:not(#root) {
  display: none;
}
</style><sys_class_name>content_css</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-03 07:29:50</sys_created_on><sys_id>ee12a78e8372b210ab2a7629feaad346</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>gadget_stylesheet</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>content_css_ee12a78e8372b210ab2a7629feaad346</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-04 08:06:32</sys_updated_on><type>local</type><url/></content_css></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_0b8b12422be7ba10f0a9f42ac891bff6
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx.TranscriptProcessor</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>TranscriptProcessor</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var TranscriptProcessor = Class.create();
TranscriptProcessor.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor, {
  addTranscriptMessage: function () {
    var gaHelper = new GlideAjaxHelper();

	var transcriptData = gaHelper.getStringFromParameter(this.getParameter('sysparm_transcriptdata'));

		if (!transcriptData) {
			return JSON.stringify({
				error: 'No transcript data found error',
				message: e.message
			});
		}

		var data = JSON.parse(transcriptData);

		gs.info("restApiProcessor - transcript call data: " + transcriptData);
	
		var participantId = data.role === '2_Agent' ? 'AGENT' : 'CUSTOMER';

		var request = [ 
			{ 
				"isEvent": false,
				"isInternalMessage": false,
				"beginOffsetMillis": data.startTimestamp/1000 ,
				"content": data.transcript,
				"endOffsetMillis": data.endTimestamp/1000,
				"participantId": participantId,
				"sentiment":"NEUTRAL",
				"id": undefined,
				"loudnessScore": null
			}
		];

		var result = new sn_cs.VoiceTranscriptObject.addVoiceInteractionMessage(data.sharedRecordId, JSON.stringify(request));

		if (result) {
			return JSON.stringify({
				message:result
			}); 
		}else{
			
			return JSON.stringify({
				error: 'Add message error',
				message: e.message
			});
	}
  },
  type: 'TranscriptProcessor'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-12 09:08:57</sys_created_on><sys_id>0b8b12422be7ba10f0a9f42ac891bff6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TranscriptProcessor</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_0b8b12422be7ba10f0a9f42ac891bff6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-23 09:47:19</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_f70ef7f22b57be907939ff29c891bf60
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl/><http_method>POST</http_method><name>Cisco_CCIF_Subflow</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
	var requestBody = request.body;
	var requestData = requestBody.data;
	{
		action_type = requestData.action_type;
		cisco_phone_number = requestData.cisco_phone_number;
		cisco_collected_digits = requestData.cisco_collected_digits;
		servicenow_subflow_name = requestData.servicenow_subflow_name; 
		servicenow_interaction_sysid = requestData.servicenow_interaction_sysid; 
	}

	var inputs = {};
	inputs['action_type'] = action_type; // String 
	inputs['cisco_phone_number'] = cisco_phone_number; // String 
	inputs['cisco_collected_digits'] = cisco_collected_digits; // String 
	inputs['servicenow_interaction_sysid'] = servicenow_interaction_sysid; // String 

	var result = sn_fd.FlowAPI.getRunner().subflow('global.' + servicenow_subflow_name).inForeground().withInputs(inputs).run();
	var outputs = result.getOutputs();
	
	var subflow_code = outputs['subflow_code']; // String
	var subflow_message = outputs['subflow_message']; // String

	response.setBody({
		"subflow_code":  subflow_code,
		"subflow_message":  subflow_message
	});
	return;

})
